name: Module Path Ownership Proof Gate
purpose: Produce direct Evidence that tracked-path facts are exact, Module write ownership is total and exclusive, and Context Capsules consume the same opaque ownership product.

oracle.description: The fixed Assurance Runtime tracked-path observation proof must exist and exit zero.

rejects: a partial, failed, truncated, duplicated, malformed, or over-limit tracked-path observation treated as exact
tracked paths emitted without canonical repository-relative normalization or an exact digest

residualUncertainty: The proof characterizes the current-host Git adapter; cross-platform command and encoding boundaries remain an explicit Assurance Runtime Gap.

oracle.description: The fixed Project Model ownership and Context Capsule attack scenario must exist and exit zero.

rejects: an unowned tracked path or a path matched by multiple Module owners
latent overlap between effective write or disposition selector domains without a currently tracked witness
an absolute, parent-relative, NUL-bearing, or unsupported selector
a forged, serialized, wrong-Model, stale-path-facts, or over-limit ownership product
Context Capsule write scope derived directly from Module declarations or an ungoverned disposition

residualUncertainty: Read context may intentionally overlap; this Gate proves exclusive write ownership and does not infer architectural coupling from imports or file contents.
The selector grammar is deliberately restricted to exact paths and literal recursive prefixes rather than general glob intersection.

oracle.description: The fixed Kernel scenario must prove one stable ownership product is reused for Context Capsule and touched-path enforcement and exit zero.

rejects: Kernel reinterpreting ownership selectors or dispositions instead of consuming the Project Model product
Context Capsule and touched-path checks consuming different Model or tracked-path observations
a frozen Candidate retaining write authority after ownership policy or path facts drift

residualUncertainty: Filesystem capability enforcement and worker execution remain later Outcomes; this Gate proves the compiled authorization input and Kernel adoption seam.
